name: drabon-med-redesign-demos
description: Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS redesign demos for Drabon Med

scripts.check:
python3 - <<'PY'
import pathlib
from html.parser import HTMLParser
root = pathlib.Path('.')
html_files = list(root.rglob('*.html'))
css_files = list(root.rglob('*.css'))
js_files = list(root.rglob('*.js'))
assert html_files, 'No HTML files found'
assert css_files, 'No CSS files found'
assert js_files, 'No JS files found'
class Parser(HTMLParser):
    pass
for file in html_files:
    Parser().feed(file.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for file in css_files + js_files:
    text = file.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
    assert text.strip(), f'{file} is empty'
print(f'Validated {len(html_files)} HTML, {len(css_files)} CSS, {len(js_files)} JS files.')
PY
